name: propose_parent_update
description: Submit a request to update a file in the current entity's parent entity. The change will NOT take effect immediately — it requires human approval via `nutshell-review-updates`. Use to propose improvements to inherited prompts, skills, or tool schemas owned by the parent entity.

file_path.description: Path relative to the parent entity root (e.g. 'prompts/system.md', 'skills/creator-mode/SKILL.md').

content.description: The full new content for the file (complete replacement, not a diff).

reason.description: Why this change improves the inherited parent entity. Be specific — the human reviewer will use this to decide whether to approve.
